nasb.text: He said to me, “This is the chamber which faces toward the south, intended for the priests who keep charge of the temple;

esv.text: And he said to me, “This chamber that faces south is for the priests who have charge of the temple,

cnv.text: 他對我說：“這間朝向南面的房子是給那些負責聖殿職事的祭司使用的。

ccb.text: 他对我说：“向南的厢房是给殿内供职的祭司用的，
